description: DAC Young Fellows Fellowship. Covered conference registration costs for DAC 2026.
DAC Young Fellows Fellowship. Covered conference registration and travel costs for [DAC 2025](https://archive.dac.com/about/conference-archive/62nd-dac-2025.html).
[HKU Foundation](https://giving.hku.hk/about) Entrance Scholarship, covering full tuition for the duration of study.
